title: Add auth_service unit tests
description: Add unit tests for AuthService.generate_token, verify_token, and refresh_token in tests/unit/test_auth_service.py. Test that generate_token returns a non-empty string, verify_token round-trips correctly, refresh_token returns a new token, and invalid tokens return None.
acceptance: pytest tests/unit/test_auth_service.py --collect-only shows >=5 test items; pytest tests/unit/test_auth_service.py -v passes all; grep 'def test_generate_token\|def test_verify_token\|def test_refresh_token' tests/unit/test_auth_service.py returns 3+ test names
implementation_commit_msg: test(auth): add 8 unit tests for AuthService
